title: Provider Review
description: Schema for individual provider reviews consumed by the build pipeline.

provider_slug.description: URL-safe identifier for the provider (e.g. bay-plumbing-co).

review_text.description: Body of the review. May be a PLACEHOLDER string for sample data.

review_date.description: Date the review was written, in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

verified.description: Whether the review has been verified (Google-verified or provider-confirmed).
